author: claude
content: Explicitly SEPARATE from the Firefox 151 bump PR (#1186). #1186 fixes only the production crawl launch path (deploy_firefox + the test helper) and intentionally does NOT touch manual_test.py. This issue owns the manual_test.py rot end-to-end (Selenium-4 API fix + the -remote-allow-system-access flag + the new CI smoke test), as its own PR. Do not fold into #1186.
